001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.IncubatorDao;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Incubator;
006import java.util.List;
007import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
008import javax.inject.Inject;
009
010public class IncubatorRepositoryImpl implements IncubatorRepository {
011
012  private final IncubatorDao incubatorDao;
013
014  @Inject
015  IncubatorRepositoryImpl(IncubatorDao incubatorDao) {
016    this.incubatorDao = incubatorDao;
017  }
018
019  @Override
020  public LiveData<List<Incubator>> getActiveIncubators() {
021    return incubatorDao.selectAll();
022  }
023
024  @Override
025  public LiveData<Incubator> get(long id) {
026    return incubatorDao.select(id);
027  }
028
029  @Override
030  public CompletableFuture<Long> save(Incubator incubator) {
031    return CompletableFuture.supplyAsync(() -> {
032      if (incubator.getId() == 0L) {
033        long id = incubatorDao.insert(incubator);
034        incubator.setId(id);
035        return id;
036      } else {
037        incubatorDao.update(incubator);
038        return incubator.getId();
039      }
040    });
041  }
042
043  @Override
044  public CompletableFuture<Void> deactivate(Incubator incubator) {
045    return CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
046      incubator.setActive(false);
047      incubatorDao.update(incubator);
048    });
049  }
050}
